prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约1046→1232→1319→1318→1277名，整体呈后移趋势，2022年起稳定在1300名附近，2025年略前移至1277名；近5年波动区间约10 46–1319名，2025年基准约1277名；该校在河南省理科/物理类招生计划2021–2024年均为136/134人，2025年133人，2026年大幅扩招至191人，较2025年增 加58人（+43.6%），扩招幅度显著，理论上会拉低位次（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第15名持续上升至2026年第11名，稳居全 国顶尖高校行列，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要因杨昀师德失范与学术不端事件引发舆论漩涡；抖音热度排名第56（较热）， 关注度中等；未见投档断档历史记录。负面舆情可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；拥有16个A-及以上学科，其中仪器科学与技术、材料科学与工程、生物 医学工程、管理科学与工程、航空宇航科学与技术、计算机科学与技术、软件工程7个A+学科，学科实力顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信 息/通信、电气工程等北航核心专业大类持续高热推荐；河南省2026年考生总数约120万，较2025年（物理类55.5万+历史类35.2万≈90.7万）大幅增长约32%，竞争显著加剧；北航位于北京，属全国性顶尖高校，在河南省无特殊地域偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年 基准位次1277名、2026年大幅扩招43.6%的拉低效应、河南省考生总数激增约32%的推高效应、以及北航顶尖学科实力与负面舆情并存的多重因素，预计2026年位次较2025年明显后 移，但扩招幅度大于考生增幅，整体竞争压力有所缓解。预测最低位次约1591名，区间1410–1772名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 1046 → 1232 → 1319 → 1318 → 1277, showing an overall backward trend. Since 2022, it has stabilized around 1300, with a slight forward shift to 1277 in 2025. The fluctuation range over the past 5 years is about 1046–1319, with a baseline of approximately 1277 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Henan Province for science/physics category was 136/134 from 2021 to 2024, 133 in 2025, and a significant expansion to 191 in 2026, an increase of 58 people (+43.6%) compared to 2025. This substantial expansion theoretically lowers the ranking (increases the ranking number).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 15th in 2021 to 11th in 2026, firmly among the top universities nationwide, with strong appeal to high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly due to the moral misconduct and academic integrity incident of Yang Yun, causing a public opinion storm. Douyin popularity ranking is 56th (relatively hot), with moderate attention. No history of admission cut-off gaps has been observed. Negative public opinion may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. It has 16 A- or above disciplines, including 7 A+ disciplines: Instrument Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Aerospace Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, and Software Engineering. The discipline strength is top-notch and highly matches the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors at Beihang, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, continue to be highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Henan Province is approximately 1.2 million, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (physics category 555,000 + history category 352,000 ≈ 907,000), intensifying competition. Beihang is located in Beijing, a national top university, with no special regional preference in Henan Province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1277, the significant expansion of 43.6% in 2026 which lowers the ranking, the surge in Henan candidates by about 32% which raises the ranking, and the coexistence of Beihang's top discipline strength and negative public opinion, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will significantly shift backward compared to 2025. However, the expansion rate is greater than the candidate growth rate, so overall competition pressure is somewhat alleviated. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1591, with a range of 1410–1772.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Aerospace Leading Program)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computing and Intelligent Science).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 1410–1772, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 information and engineer experimental classes as the main choices. Tier 1 computer top talent program and future aerospace leading program can be used as reach goals. Tier 3 aerospace and aviation and science experimental classes serve as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1410), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 720 → 759 → 700 → 690 → 549. From 2021 to 2024, it remained stable in the 690–759 range. In 2025, due to a sharp drop in enrollment plan from 13 to 6, the ranking moved significantly forward to 549 (harder to enter), showing notable fluctuation. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Henan Province was 10 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 13 in 2024, dropped to 6 in 2025, and remained at 6 in 2026, with the plan unchanged. It is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 11th on the Soft Science main list, a top national university. Although liberal arts are not its main strength, the university's brand effect is strong.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', affected by the Yang Yun incident impacting overall image; Douyin popularity ranking is 56 (relatively hot); no historical record of gaps in liberal arts admissions; Beihang's Foreign Language and Literature is an A-level discipline, and the Social Sciences Experimental Class covers economics, administrative management, law, etc., forming cross-disciplinary training with the university's advantageous disciplines like Management Science and Engineering A+ (e.g., AI-Administrative Management dual degree).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has a relatively hot social popularity recommendation, economics/finance categories are divided and wait-and-see; Henan Province in 2026 has about 1.2 million total examinees, with history category examinees estimated at about 468,000 based on recent proportion of about 39%, an increase of about 33% from 352,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Beihang is located in Beijing, a top national university, with no special regional preference in Henan Province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 549, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged, a significant increase of about 33% in history category examinees in Henan Province leading to intensified competition, and Beihang's top brand effect, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will slightly move forward compared to 2025 (harder to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is about 534, with a range of 473–595.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Social Sciences Experimental Class (Law, Administrative Management, Economics directions).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Social Sciences Experimental Class (Foreign Language Cross-Disciplinary Talent Training Experimental Class, English, Translation directions).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Beihang only has one major category in Henan liberal arts, the Social Sciences Experimental Class (with two major directions), and rankings within the predicted range of 473–595 are all eligible for application. It is recommended to focus on law and administrative management directions, with the foreign language cross-disciplinary direction as a safe choice. Rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<473) can be boldly applied.
